title: aira scoparia
intro: Aira scoparia, also known as Wood Millet, is a type of annual grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Aira scoparia lie in its seeds, which contain a compound called avenanthramides that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Aira scoparia is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form for its medicinal properties.
